markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore a content partnership between Veho and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Veho's Goal:** Transition from a regional carrier to a national primary carrier, competing with FedEx/UPS for enterprise clients (Macy's, Lululemon).](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [**Core Challenge:** A weak online reputation from driver/customer complaints on Reddit/YouTube is a major blocker for long sales cycles and large RFPs, despite strong client testimonials.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Pitch:** An AI-driven content engine (strategy, creation, publishing) to build authority and capture buyer intent in traditional search and LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT).](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** A $40k strategy sprint followed by a $15k/mo editorial workstream (5 articles/week) to build a foundational content library. Reddit reputation management could be a separate, flexible workstream.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Topics

### Veho's Business & Market Position

  - [**Model:** B2B parcel delivery for major e-commerce brands (Macy's, Saks, Lululemon).](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Differentiation:** An asset-light, tech-first model using a gig economy driver network → lower costs and flexible capacity for clients.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [**Strategic Goal:** Evolve from a regional carrier to a national primary carrier, competing directly with FedEx and UPS.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

### The Reputation & Content Challenge

  - [**ICP:** VPs of Transportation/Logistics, for whom shipping is a major P\&L line item.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [**Sales Cycle:** Long and high-stakes (multi-year contracts, millions in value), making reputation critical.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [**Key Blocker:** Negative content from driver/customer complaints on Reddit and YouTube is a major RFP risk.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [**Buyer Journey Insight:** Veho's research shows enterprise buyers use ChatGPT to analyze vendors, but Veho has low share of voice in LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [**Content Gap:** Current content is product-focused, missing the educational, SEO-driven articles needed to build authority and capture buyer intent.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Solution

  - [**Service:** An end-to-end content partner providing strategy, AI-driven creation, and publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
    1.  [**Context Engineering:** Ingest Veho's brand/product docs to create a foundational knowledge base.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
    2.  [**Strategy:** Map keywords to topic clusters to build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
    3.  [**Execution:** Use AI workflows with human oversight to draft articles.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
    4.  [**Publishing:** Handle CMS staging and publishing after Veho's review.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)
  - [**Pricing:**](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (Strategy Sprint):** $40k one-time fee.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Ongoing):** $15k/month per workstream.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
          - [**Editorial:** 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
          - [**Programmatic:** Large-scale content (e.g., vendor directories, state guides).](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
          - [**Reddit:** Reputation management.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
      - [**Flexibility:** The Reddit workstream's cost could be lower than $15k/mo if a scalable workflow is defined.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Schedule a demo for Veho's team.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=1791.0)
  - [**Rachel:** Invite relevant team members to the demo.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
  - [**Both:** Meet for a demo on **Thursday, November 20th, at 1:30 PM Pacific**.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuxzXB5hf6L1wx1s3bsXRif2e2yDn3a?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
